mapper.select:
SELECT id, ip_addr AS ipAddr, remark, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_ip_whitelist
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, ip_addr AS ipAddr, remark, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sys_ip_whitelist WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT ip_addr FROM sys_ip_whitelist WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
